name: Oxytocin
description: Endogenous peptide hormone. Na farko-line uterotonic for rigakafi da kuma lura da postpartum hemorrhage (PPH). Yana haifar da kumburin mahaifa kuma yana rage zubar jini bayan haihuwa. Ana bayarwa BAYAN haihuwar mahaifa.
indications: Rigakafin zubar jini na haihuwa (na yau da kullun bayan haihuwa)
Maganin zubar jinin bayan haihuwa (uterine atony)
dose: Rigakafin PPH: Raka'a 10 IM nan da nan bayan isar da wuri (hanyar filin da aka fi so). PPH magani: 10-40 raka'a a cikin 1L IV, saka a 40-80 mU / min. Idan IV ba ya samuwa: raka'a 10 IM.
window: Ba da bayan haihuwa -- bayarwa kafin haihuwa na iya kama mahaifa.
contraindications: Bacin rai tayi tare da bata kai
warnings: BAYAN BAYAN AN KASANCE DA PLACENTA -- tarko placenta matsala ce mai barazanar rai.
IV bolus na iya haifar da hauhawar jini mai tsanani da arrhythmia na zuciya -- koyaushe yana tsomawa kuma a saka a hankali.
Tasirin antidiuretic tare da babban kundin - saka idanu don hyponatremia.

obstetric.note: Primary uterotonic. Idan atony na mahaifa bai amsa ba, yi la'akari da misoprostol, tranexamic acid (TXA), matsawar mahaifa bimanual, da MEDEVAC mai sauri.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / WHO PPH Guidelines
